_comment: Hero image slots. build.py reads `src` and overlays the eyebrow/headline as crisp HTML. Placeholders are abstract SVGs (tools/gen_placeholders.py). To use generated raster art, drop a PNG into assets/heroes/ and point `src` at it — nothing else changes.
